title: taraxacum zevenbergenii
intro: Taraxacum zevenbergenii, also known as the Zevenbergen dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing bitter compounds and inulin, which are known for their digestive benefits. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to aid digestion, support liver function, and reduce inflammation. Taraxacum zevenbergenii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
